acceptance_criteria: Planner can return multi-step registered tool plans.
Tool registry loads built-in manifests and refuses unknown tools.
`/x find the quote that I downloaded today` runs as read-only local file/document search.
`/ summarize this doc` resolves explicit paths, pipeline input, last result, latest downloaded document.
Document summarization chunks large files and produces a final summary.
Markdown conversion uses Pandoc only when available and generates dependency guidance when missing.
Tool outputs are represented as structured observations.
Agent loop respects max steps, max tool calls, mutation pause rules.
Pester tests cover tool registry, document resolution, local tools, observations, agent loop.
prd_refs: PRD §15.2 v0.2 local tool runtime acceptance (lines 2864-2877)
description: Checklist gate that closes the v0.2 milestone. Verify all 11 acceptance criteria from PRD §15.2 against the running implementation.
notes: v0.2 is the largest milestone surface-area-wise; budget for iteration.
steps: Walk every criterion against the running tree.
name: [gate-v02] v0.2 acceptance gate
